verses.1: Hear the word which the LORD speaks to you, house of Israel!
verses.3: For the customs of the peoples are vanity;
verses.4: They deck it with silver and with gold.
verses.5: They are like a palm tree, of turned work,
verses.6: There is no one like you, LORD.
verses.8: But they are together brutish and foolish,
verses.9: There is silver beaten into plates, which is brought from Tarshish,
verses.10: But the LORD is the true God.
verses.11: “You shall say this to them: ‘The gods that have not made the heavens and the earth will perish from the earth, and from under the heavens.’”
verses.12: God has made the earth by his power.
verses.14: Every man has become brutish and without knowledge.
verses.15: They are vanity, a work of delusion.
verses.16: The portion of Jacob is not like these;
verses.17: Gather up your wares out of the land,
verses.19: Woe is me because of my injury!
verses.21: For the shepherds have become brutish,
verses.22: The voice of news, behold, it comes,
verses.23: LORD, I know that the way of man is not in himself.
verses.25: Pour out your wrath on the nations that don’t know you,
